items.name: qecc-aware-qml-trainer
items.description: The qecc-aware-qml-trainer is a quantum-classical framework that seamlessly integrates error mitigation codes (QECC) into Quantum Machine Learning (QML) circuits. It provides real-time fidelity tracking, noise-aware training, and automated error correction deployment—addressing the key blocker in reviews for practical QML applications.

items.name: Data-encryption-through-the-encoding-of-high-and-moderate-plaintext-information-blocks
items.description: A hybrid image encryption framework fusing machine learning and chaotic cryptography. It utilizes ML to classify image blocks by information density, enabling adaptive selective encryption. Combining bit-plane manipulation, chaotic maps, and multiple S-boxes, it optimizes speed and security for real-time IoT and resource-constrained environments.

items.name: ML_OFDM_PROJECT

This project bridges synthetic biology and machine learning to demonstrate information storage and retrieval through biological self-assembly.

items.name: MILP_GNN
items.description: MILP_GNN is a Python research codebase for learning branching strategies in Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) using machine learning. The project implements graph convolutional neural networks and multilayer perceptrons to predict effective branching variables within a branch-and-bound solver framework.

The project integrates data engineering, advanced machine-learning models, hyperparameter optimisation, and algorithmic trading mechanisms.
